tweet: This additional bill would extend home & automobile leasing protections by allowing the spouses of catastrophically injured servicemembers to terminate property leases and automobile leases, and Gold Star spouses to terminate automobile leases.

tweet: It brings me great pride to say this bill was signed into law last year and I hope it will bring some relief to our Gold Star families among difficult times. But this Congress, I introduced a second piece of legislation to take it another step further.
